turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “The scenario is I'm calling, emailing, or visiting a real estate agency to ask about rental property. I want to attend an inception and ask about the application process or follow up after submitting my document. I want to practice English clearly and politely in a formal setting.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So now, I will go to the real estate property, and you are the counselor.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm interested in the one-bedroom, one-bedroom, one-bathroom unit on the Australia's”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “here about two months ago. No, no, no. I mean two months later. And I have the rental budget. My rental budget is...”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I need to, the location need to in the Melbourne city and I like the high level of apartment. And also.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “If I want an application, can I apply online or do I need to visit the office?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Then I will ask what documents do I need to include with my application.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, and...” English Conversational Partner ： Awesome! Whenever you're ready to continue, just let me know. I'm here to help with whatever you need.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I mean, can I go to the apartment? Can I have the inception time on the weekend?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Also, I want to apply to another apartment that I'm interested in. Can I apply to both apartments?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And also, would it be possible to negotiate the list length?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I want to know what makes a strong rental application? I mean, I have a rental history in Australia before, and what kind of another strong rental application that I need to have?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm an international student. I don't have the stable income, but my parents will pay all of the bills and my rental stuff.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I mean, if I apply to a people who have stable jobs, it will affect my application.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So, if someone else also applies, how do you choose?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So, can I apply now and bring the documents later?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do I need to pay any bound before signing the list?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “How many bonds should I need to pay?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, and last question. If I break the list earlier, what's the consequence?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, that's enough. Thank you.”
